message:
chore: doc rebrand to FCPS, remove self-referential dev-deps, conformance schema assertions, beads

Housekeeping across several crates:

fcp-registry/src/lib.rs:
- Doc rebrand from "FCP2" to "FCPS artifact mirroring"
- Import reordering (semver::Version alphabetized)

fcp-conformance/tests/no_mock_integration.rs:
- Add schema-namespace assertions on mirrored registry objects
  (ConnectorManifestObject, ConnectorBinaryObject,
  ConnectorBinarySymbolSet all must have namespace "fcp.core")

connectors/discord/Cargo.toml:
- Remove self-referential fcp-discord dev-dep

connectors/discord/src/connector.rs:
- Change cfg!(feature = "testing") to cfg!(debug_assertions) for
  localhost network allowlist — works in any debug build without
  requiring a dedicated feature flag

connectors/llm-router/Cargo.toml:
- Remove self-referential fcp-llm-router dev-dep

Cargo.lock: Updated for all dependency graph changes.
.beads/issues.jsonl: Tracker updates for FCP3 migration progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
